'''badotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squamate|squamate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squamate|squamate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| badotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bædetheth|bædetheth]] || [[word:bædethej|bædethej]] || [[word:bædethesh|bædethesh]] || [[word:bædethe|bædethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:badodothoth|badodothoth]] || [[word:badodothoj|badodothoj]] || [[word:badodothosh|badodothosh]] || [[word:badodotho|badodotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:badothoth|badothoth]] || [[word:badothoj|badothoj]] || [[word:badothosh|badothosh]] || [[word:badotho|badotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:badofthoth|badofthoth]] || [[word:badofthoj|badofthoj]] || [[word:badofthosh|badofthosh]] || [[word:badofthof|badofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:badothotho|badothotho]] || [[word:badothojo|badothojo]] || [[word:badothosho|badothosho]] || [[word:badothoko|badothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:badothoth|badothoth]] || [[word:badothoj|badothoj]] || [[word:badothosh|badothosh]] || [[word:badotho|badotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:badothothol|badothothol]] || [[word:badothojol|badothojol]] || [[word:badothoshol|badothoshol]] || [[word:badothokol|badothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:badothothotho|badothothotho]] || [[word:badothojojo|badothojojo]] || [[word:badothoshosho|badothoshosho]] || [[word:badothoko|badothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:badothothon|badothothon]] || [[word:badothojon|badothojon]] || [[word:badothoshon|badothoshon]] || [[word:badothokon|badothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:badothothoro|badothothoro]] || [[word:badothojoro|badothojoro]] || [[word:badothoshoro|badothoshoro]] || [[word:badothokoro|badothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
